Module com.github.cowwoc.pouch.core
Package com.github.cowwoc.pouch.core

Class ConcurrentChildScopes

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.pouch.core.ConcurrentChildScopes
public final class ConcurrentChildScopes
extends Object
Graceful shutdown of child scopes from a parent scope that requires thread-safety.

This class is thread-safe.

Preconditions that apply to all methods:

  • Parent scope is not closed.
  • Child scope implementations of close() are idempotent.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors 
    Constructor Description
    ConcurrentChildScopes()
    Creates a new ConcurrentChildScopes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    boolean close​(Duration timeout)
    Closes all child scopes.
    <T extends AutoCloseable>
    T    		 createChildScope​(Supplier<T> supplier)
    Creates a new child scope.
    boolean onClosed​(AutoCloseable scope)
    Notifies the parent scope that a child has closed.

    Methods declared in class java.lang.Object

  • Constructor Details

    • ConcurrentChildScopes

      public ConcurrentChildScopes()
      Creates a new ConcurrentChildScopes.

  • Method Details

    • createChildScope

      public <T extends AutoCloseable> T createChildScope​(Supplier<T> supplier)
      Creates a new child scope.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the child scope
      Parameters:
      supplier - supplies a child scope
      Returns:
      a new child scope
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if supplier is null

    • onClosed

      public boolean onClosed​(AutoCloseable scope)
      Notifies the parent scope that a child has closed.

      Parameters:
      scope - the scope that was closed
      Returns:
      true on success; false if the scope was not found or was already closed
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if scope is null

    • close

      public boolean close​(Duration timeout)
      Closes all child scopes.
      Parameters:
      timeout - the maximum amount of time to wait for child scopes to shut down before invoking their close() method
      Returns:
      true if child scopes shut down gracefully, false if a timeout occurred
